title: Netherite's Recipe Tweaks
description: Adds and changes some recipes in the game in a vanilla-friendly way to make it more enjoyable. Includes trident, chain, trapdoors, buttons, pressure plates, concrete, stonecutter recipes, and more!
body:
### **OVERVIEW**
Netherite's Recipe Tweaks is a simple and vanilla-friendly Datapack that tweaks some recipes, as well as adding some new ones.
The pack also edits advancements so that you will unlock these recipes while playing the game just like other items.

### **FEATURES**
**Crafting Table**
- _Buttons_ and _pressure plates_ craft into 6 instead of 1
- _Trapdoors_ craft into 6 instead of 2
- _Weighted pressure plates_ only craft into 3
- _Chains_ craft into 3
- _Chainmail armor_ can be crafted like other armor using _chains_
- _Tridents_ can be crafted with 3 _nether quartz_, a _diamond_, and a _prismarine shard_. (See image in gallery)
- _Saddles_ can be crafted from 5 _leather_, 2 _string_, a _lead_, and an _iron ingot_. (See image in gallery)
- _Name tags_ can be crafted with 2 _paper_, an _iron ingot_, a _slimeball_, a _string_, and an _item frame_. (See image in gallery)
- _Quartz blocks_ and _amethyst blocks_ can be crafted back into 4 of their corresponding items
- _Horse armor_ can be crafted using 7 of it's corresponding item
- _Concrete_ can be crafted directly from _concrete powder_ by surrounding a _water bucket_ with _concrete powder_. (See image in gallery)

**Stonecutter**
- _Stone_ and _deepslate_ can be crafted into _cobblestone_ and _cobbled deepslate_ items through a _stonecutter_

### **FUTURE**
More stuff might get added in the future. If you want a recipe added, feel free to dm me on discord _@netheritespy986_. If I think what you suggest goes well with the pack, I might add it! Keep in mind brewing recipes currently cannot be added.

### **HOW TO INSTALL**
1. Download the datapack for the version of Minecraft you're using. If it doesnt show your version, it probably doesn't have a pack version and you'll have to try another version but it might not work. If it says that the pack is outdated, ignore it. The pack might not work, but it will never ruin your world.
2. When you create your world, go to the 'More' tab, and click 'Data Packs'. Drag the download into the folder, and make sure to click it into the right side of the screen. Now hit 'Done', and create your world!
3. If you want to add the pack to an existing world, select your world, click 'Edit', and click 'Open World Folder'. Now drag the download into the 'datapacks' folder. If you don't have a datapacks folder, just create one.
4. To add the pack to a server, you might need to look up a tutorial on how to add a datapack to your server hosting website. Try to navigate to the 'world' folder, and put the download in the 'datapacks' folder. Again, if you dont have one, create one.
5. Enjoy!
